# Project Buildup History: Android Edge Vision for Logistics

- Repository: `android-edge-vision-logistics`
- Category: `ops_platform`
- Subtype: `generic`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2024-06-25 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Android Edge Vision for Logistics should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the operational problem Android Edge Vision for Logistics is meant to solve and who feels the pain so the project had a decent base. At this stage nothing was fully locked, so I kept a rough list of things that looked useful and ignored the rest for now. I kept imagining how an actual operator would move through the steps so the project would not feel fake.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem brief written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. I also left myself a few rough reminders for the next day so I would not have to rediscover the same context again.
